ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution associated with the publication */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period during which the publication was made */,
  "euro" REAL /* Funding amount in euros */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is hybrid (true/false) */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract or summary of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Research area or category of the publication */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is open access */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type for the publication (e.g., CC BY, CC BY-NC) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "page_numbers" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication in the journal */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the publisher is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_full_title" TEXT /* Full title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* Print ISSN */,
  "issn_electronic" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN */,
  "issn_online" TEXT /* Online ISSN */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that received funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the funding amount */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Project ID associated with the funding */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the researcher belongs to */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's profile */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_publications" (
  "researcher_pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-publication link */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_publications_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cited_by" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cited publication */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that is citing */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was made */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context or excerpt of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cited_by_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cited_by_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the user */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metrics record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the publication */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the publication */,
  "altmetric_score" REAL /* Altmetric score of the publication */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
